claim_support.reason: Material claim in Recent Developments Paragraph 1 regarding 'year-over-year' growth is contradicted by the logic of the cited calculation evidence (which shows Q3 vs Q2 comparison, i.e., QoQ). While the numbers are supported, the classification of the metric is not supported by the cited evidence structure.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Severe numerical labeling error in Recent Developments Paragraph 1. Revenue growth (28.82%) and Net Income growth (44.04%) are labeled as 'year-over-year', but the authoritative cited calculations explicitly define the comparison period as 'Q2' (Sequential/Quarter-over-Quarter). This misclassification materially alters the financial interpretation.

citation_precision.reason: Authoritative cited chunk IDs and calc IDs are correctly listed for each paragraph and correspond to the evidence blocks provided. No missing or mismatched IDs detected relative to the structured grounding record.

temporal_validity.reason: All news sources and financial periods (Q3 2025) are consistent with the report As-of date of 2025-11-12. No post-as-of data usage detected.

consistency.reason: Severe internal inconsistency. Recent Developments Paragraph 1 labels 28.82% revenue growth as 'year-over-year', while Financial Analysis Paragraph 1 correctly labels the same 28.82% figure as 'quarter-over-quarter'. This contradiction changes the investment interpretation of growth momentum.
